welcome.title: Welcome to the Designer
welcome.body: Build your profile by dragging pieces onto the page. No code needed. Here's a quick tour.

blocks.title: Your building blocks
blocks.body: Drag any of these onto the page. The themed templates are ready-made styled sections; the plain blocks let you build your own. Hover one to preview what it is.

canvas.title: Your profile page
canvas.body: Drop blocks here, then click any text to type your own. Select a piece to move or restyle it.

mode.title: Designer or code
mode.body: Prefer writing your own HTML and CSS? Switch to Source any time. Your work carries across both ways.

save.title: Save when you're ready
save.body: Happy with it? Hit Save to publish your profile. You can come back and tweak it whenever you like.

welcome.title: Welcome to The Spire
welcome.body: Here is a quick tour of the screen so you know where everything is. It takes about a minute, and you can replay it any time from Help.

identity.title: You and your characters
identity.body: This button at the bottom of the rail shows who you are posting as. Click it to switch into a character, create one, or go back to yourself. To open your own profile, use the Menu just below, or type /profile.

menu.title: The Menu holds everything
menu.body: Open the Menu for your profile, worlds, forums, messages, friends, and Help. When you are not sure where something lives, look here first.

composer.title: Say something
composer.body: Type here and press Enter to talk. Start a line with / for commands, @ to mention someone, or : to write an action.

rooms.title: Move between rooms
rooms.body: Every room you can join is listed here with its headcount. Click a room's name to hop in. Private rooms ask for a password.

communities.title: Explore communities
communities.body: These icons are the communities you have joined. Use the button at the bottom to discover more, or to apply to start your own.

forums.title: Forums, and this tour again
forums.body: Forums, for writing you want to keep, live in the Menu and above the room list. You can replay this whole tour any time from Help.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Forums
welcome.body: Forums are for long-form writing you want to keep — boards and topics that stay put instead of scrolling away like chat.

discover.title: Discover more forums
discover.body: Tap the compass to browse other communities' forums and search any of them by name or tag.

startYourOwn.title: Start your own
startYourOwn.body: Ready to gather your own community? Look for the Create your Forum button to apply, and a keeper will review it.

startTopic.title: Start a topic
startTopic.body: Each section on a board has a New Topic button. Click it to open a fresh topic right where you want it.

giveTitle.title: Give it a title
giveTitle.body: When the topic opens, name it at the top, then write your opening post just below.

tag.title: Tag it
tag.body: Add a tag so people can tell at a glance what a topic is about. You'll find the tag picker on the topic once it's open.

sayOrAct.title: Say or act
sayOrAct.body: Replies default to speech. Switch a reply to Action to describe what your character does instead of what they say.

npc.title: Voice an NPC
npc.body: If the keeper allows it, switch a reply to NPC to post as one of your saved characters and bring the scene to life.

post.title: Post it
post.body: When you're happy, send your reply and it joins the topic for everyone to read.

name.title: Name your forum
name.body: This is what everyone will see in the catalog. Pick something that fits your community.

address.title: Choose an address
address.body: This is the short link people use to find you. It has to be free, and we'll tell you if it's taken.

purpose.title: Tell us the purpose
purpose.body: Explain what your forum gathers and what its boards will hold. Reviewers read this before approving.

submit.title: Send it in
submit.body: Apply when you're ready. A site moderator reviews it, and you'll hear back here and in chat.

settings.title: Your forum settings
settings.body: Everything you need to run the place lives in these tabs. Pick one to open its tools.

basics.title: The basics
basics.body: Overview sets your forum's name, purpose, and who can join or post. Boards is where you add and reorder the boards inside it.

team.title: Your team
team.body: In Roles you promote trusted members to moderators and choose exactly what each of them is allowed to do.

keepOrder.title: Keep order
keepOrder.body: Bans lets you remove troublemakers, for a while or for good, and lift a ban later.

modLog.title: The paper trail
modLog.body: The Mod log records what your moderators have done, so nothing happens in the dark.

name.title: Name your server
name.body: Give your community a name people will recognize. You can change how it looks later.

address.title: Pick an address
address.body: This is the short link people use to reach your server. We check it's free as you type.

purpose.title: Say what it's for
purpose.body: Tell our reviewers who your community is for and what its rooms will hold.

submit.title: Send it in
submit.body: Apply and our moderators take it from there. You'll hear back here and in chat once it's decided.

controlRoom.title: Your server's control room
controlRoom.body: Everything about this community lives behind these tabs. Pick one to work on it, and your changes save right here.

overview.title: Name and how people join
overview.body: The Overview tab sets your server's name, tagline, and whether folks join instantly, apply, or need an invite.

appearance.title: Make it yours
appearance.body: The Appearance tab is for your icon, banner, and colors, so members always know which server they're in.

rooms.title: Add your rooms
rooms.body: Open the Rooms tab and use New room to add a place to talk. Give it a name and it shows up for your members.

members.title: Give someone a hand
members.body: In the Members tab, Make mod hands a trusted member the tools to help you run the place.

roles.title: Decide who can do what
roles.body: The Roles tab is where you appoint staff and choose exactly which powers they hold. Grant only what each person needs.

save.title: Nothing is lost
save.body: Each tab has its own Save button. Make your changes, press Save, and you're done. You can reopen this walkthrough any time from the question mark up top.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Admin Panel
welcome.body: This is your control room for the whole site. Everything is sorted into tabs along the top, grouped by what they do.

monitor.title: Keep an eye on things
monitor.body: Overview gives you a live snapshot, and the nearby tabs let you dig into analytics, reports, and the Staff Actions and Mod Cases logs.

people.title: People and access
people.body: Manage members here, and set what each role is allowed to do over in Roles & Permissions.

content.title: Content and community
content.body: Oversee community servers, forums, and the Scriptorium. Open a server to manage its own rooms, ranks, and rewards.

configure.title: Set up the site
configure.body: Settings, Branding, and Rules shape how the whole site looks and behaves. Changes here reach everyone, so take your time.

done.title: You are all set
done.body: You can replay this walkthrough any time from the question mark next to the tabs. Have a look around.
